invoice_number: The invoice number or reference ID
invoice_date: The date the invoice was issued
vendor_name: The name of the company or person issuing the invoice
vendor_address: The full address of the vendor
client_name: The name of the client or customer being billed
client_address: The full address of the client

line_items.description: List of all line items on the invoice

fields.tax: Tax amount for this line item

total: The total amount due including tax
